title: S + make/let/have + O + V原形（使役動詞）

formulas.zh: 使役動詞後接受詞加原形動詞，表強迫、允許或委託

formulas.formula: be made + to V（make的被動式）
formulas.zh: make被動時需改為to V，其他兩個動詞被動式仍為原形V

explanation: 使役動詞用於表示讓他人執行某動作。make表強迫或致使（帶有強制性），let表允許或准許（表自由），have表委託或吩咐（較正式）。三者後均接原形動詞。注意：make改為被動式時必須加to成為be made to V，但let和have的被動式仍保持原形。此為學測常考重點，易與被動語態混淆。

examples.eng: The teacher made the students rewrite their essays more carefully.
examples.chi: 老師強迫學生更仔細地重寫他們的文章。

examples.eng: Her parents let her attend the concert last weekend.
examples.chi: 她的父母允許她上周末參加音樂會。

examples.eng: I had my mechanic repair my car before the trip.
examples.chi: 我委託機修工在出遊前修理我的車。

examples.eng: The strict coach was made to apologize for his harsh words to the team.
examples.chi: 那位嚴格的教練被迫為對球隊的刺耳言語道歉。

extension.tip: make被動時必須加to，是最常見錯誤。記住：主動make → 被動be made to。其他動詞let和have的被動式仍保持原形。判斷時先看使役動詞，再觀察後面動詞形式，確認是否為被動語態以決定是否加to。

examples.test: The general made the soldiers advance.
examples.result: → 主動：make + O + 原形V。被動改為：The soldiers were made to advance by the general.（必須加to）

examples.test: Let him go home early today.
examples.result: → let表允許，被動式為：He was let go home early.（保持原形，不加to）

examples.test: I have the worker paint the fence.
examples.result: → have表委託，被動式為：The fence was had painted.（較少用被動，但保持原形）

extension.note: Make被動加to，Let和Have被動保原形；一個強迫兩個溫和（Let自由，Have委託）。

parts: the players run ten laps every morning.
exercises.sentence: The coach has the players run ten laps every morning.
exercises.translation: 教練每天早上讓球員跑十圈。

parts: the prisoners work in the mines without rest.
exercises.sentence: The cruel king made the prisoners work in the mines without rest.
exercises.translation: 殘暴的國王強迫囚犯在礦場不停地工作。

parts: her stay out past midnight on weekends.
exercises.sentence: Her mother lets her stay out past midnight on weekends.
exercises.translation: 她的母親允許她在週末過午夜後才回家。

parts: provide better working conditions for all employees.
exercises.sentence: The company was made to provide better working conditions for all employees.
exercises.translation: 該公司被迫為所有員工提供更好的工作條件。

vocab_table.zh: 主詞與受詞間的指使關係
